creator: numisemis@yahoo.com
text:
ports/124681 just adds .js files. My sugestion there was to use HTML/AJAX/js/ directory for the .js files. This patch adds .js files to the DATA directory, which is probably even better since other PEAR modules (eg. Structures_Graph) already have (shell) scripts in that directory.
So, I approve this patch.
ports/124681 should be closed.
